title: oxymeris aptera
side_effects: Oxymeris aptera can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, misuse of the oxymeris aptera can cause liver damage and kidney failure, requiring immediate medical attention. It is essential to use this plant under the guidance of a medical professional or a qualified herbalist to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
